name: tier-b/elixir/03-empty-apps-path
description: apps_path: "apps" is set but no apps/<name>/mix.exs subdirectories exist (apps/ dir absent). Detected stays true with resolved_roots=[]; emit Elixir-specific note umbrella_apps_path_empty (override of generic zero-root code).

manifests.mix.exs:
defmodule EmptyUmbrella.MixProject do
  use Mix.Project

  def project do
    [
      apps_path: "apps",
      version: "0.1.0",
      deps: []
    ]
  end
end
